types: Messages and call metadata (not contents due to end-to-end encryption)
Device information (IP, device ID, OS version, phone model)
Location data (if shared in messages or via Live Location)

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — local storage on device is encrypted

mfa_available.source_quote: Two-step verification available for account security

independent_audits.source_quote: WhatsApp's encryption has been audited by independent security researchers

gaps: Data sharing with Meta parent company not fully transparent
label_notes: Source: training knowledge. WhatsApp is privacy-focused compared to Meta's other platforms, with end-to-end encryption preventing even WhatsApp from reading messages. However, metadata collection and Meta parent company data sharing practices remain opaque. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
